commercial_role: Drives the click to Build Your Pack. Above-the-fold brand statement and conversion anchor.
emotional_role: Immediate desire and trust — the viewer must feel this is serious, beautiful, expensive gear.

commercial_role: Communicates the product differentiator (modular system) visually without requiring copy.
emotional_role: Clarity and excitement — the viewer understands the system immediately and wants to explore it.

commercial_role: Converts sceptical buyers via founder credibility. Essential for press and first-time buyer trust.
emotional_role: Trust and authenticity — this was built by someone who actually had this problem and cares.

section: Everyday Line — Core Black product card (Best Seller)
commercial_role: Best seller card — drives highest revenue volume. Last image before add-to-cart.
emotional_role: Immediate desirability — this is the one everyone wants.
